headline: Remote's Modern Payroll Platform Surpasses 300% Growth, Fueling Ambitious Next Chapter as the Leading Global Employment Infrastructure
summary: Remote, the global payroll and employment infrastructure platform, announced today that its payroll business has grown more than 300% year over year, with the company surpassing $300M in annual recurring revenue (ARR), and becoming cash-flow positive. With market validation and proven momentum behind it, the company is solidifying its position as the trusted payroll and employment infrastructure for businesses operating across borders.
